summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the redesigned Recap page. All backend API tests (12/12) and frontend UI tests (desktop + mobile) passed successfully. The redesign maintained all existing data/logic while applying the new premium SaaS visual design.
critical_code_review_comments: RecapPage.js uses inline styles extensively (306 lines) - consider extracting to CSS modules or Tailwind classes for maintainability
Font family defined as constant FONT but could be centralized in a theme file for consistency across pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recap page redesign testing complete. All data-testid attributes verified: recap-page, recap-back-btn, recap-hero, ai-summary, momentum-group-*, momentum-item-*, priority-*. Navigation flows work correctly (back button to /pipeline, momentum/priority item clicks to /pipeline/{program_id}). Mobile responsiveness verified at 390px width.

backend_api: Response contains momentum object with heated_up, holding_steady, cooling_off arrays
Momentum items have required fields: program_id, school_name, category, what_changed, why_it_matters, stage_label
Priority items have required fields: rank, school_name, program_id, action, reason
frontend_ui_desktop: AI Summary section present with data-testid='ai-summary'
Momentum groups present: heated_up, holding_steady, cooling_off
frontend_ui_mobile: All sections render correctly at 390px width
Page scrolls properly to show AI Summary
